overall.description: Night-time driving footage through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring elevated highways, neon-lit skyscrapers, and dense atmospheric fog. The camera moves at high speed past holographic advertisements and distinctive cylindrical architecture, with visibility gradually decreasing as the vehicle descends into lower city levels through multi-story interchanges.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit storefront before transitioning to high-speed driving along an elevated highway. The camera moves through a canyon of modern glass office towers with illuminated windows, passing buildings decorated with horizontal neon strips. The environment is dark with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

passing large bright white digital billboard that illuminates the surrounding fog

segments.scene_description: The drive continues through a more open section of the city with partial sky visibility. A distinctive cylindrical building with rainbow neon rings dominates the right side, while large digital billboards appear on both sides of the highway. The fog remains moderate, allowing visibility of distant structures.

events.description: atmospheric fog density increases significantly reducing visibility of distant buildings
passing skyscraper with illuminated 05 signage and large pink floral billboard

segments.scene_description: Visibility decreases as fog thickens throughout this segment. The camera passes a prominent skyscraper marked with 05 signage and a large floral digital billboard. Distant buildings become increasingly obscured by the dense atmospheric haze, creating a moody neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange in heavy fog with neon-lit infrastructure

events.description: vehicle descends along curved ramp with prominent blue neon edge lighting
entering dense fog zone under elevated highway overpasses with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating descending ramps and overpasses in dense fog with dramatically reduced visibility, following neon-lit pathways

descending highway ramp with bright cyan neon strip lighting along edges
multi-level highway junction structure barely visible through dense fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving through extremely dense fog in a multi-level highway interchange. The vehicle descends along ramps illuminated by distinctive blue neon lights, passing under elevated overpasses. Visibility is severely limited, with only the nearest structural elements and neon lighting visible through the thick atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis that gradually descends from clear, towering heights into a dense, atmospheric haze. It begins at a vibrant storefront before accelerating along an elevated highway through a canyon of glass office towers adorned with horizontal neon strips. As the road opens up, the camera passes a massive cylindrical building with rainbow neon rings and large digital billboards under a partially visible sky. The scene then shifts as fog begins to thicken, obscuring distant structures and blurring the edges of a skyscraper marked with 05 signage and a floral digital display. Finally, the camera descends through a multi-level highway interchange where visibility is severely limited, leaving only the glow of blue neon lights and the silhouettes of overpasses visible through the heavy mist.
